item.title: REALME MUSIC APP [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: REALME MUSIC APP [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
REALME MUSIC APP
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The Realme ColorOS Music app has been successfully ported for AOSP (Android Open Source Project) ROMs, providing an enhanced music experience for users who prefer custom ROMs on their devices. This ported version brings the feature-rich and visually appealing ColorOS Music app, originally developed for Realme devices, to a wider range of Android smartphones running AOSP-based ROMs.
With the ported Realme ColorOS Music app, users can enjoy a seamless and intuitive music playback experience. The app offers a clean and user-friendly interface, allowing easy navigation and access to various music features. It provides a comprehensive library management system, enabling users to organize and categorize their music collection efficiently.

The app supports various audio formats, ensuring compatibility with a wide range of music files. Users can create custom playlists, shuffle tracks, and enjoy personalized recommendations based on their listening habits. Additionally, it offers a powerful equalizer with preset sound profiles and manual adjustments, allowing users to fine-tune their audio settings according to their preferences.

One notable feature of the ported Realme ColorOS Music app is its integration with online music services. Users can access a vast catalog of songs, stream music online, and discover new artists and albums directly within the app. It also supports downloading music for offline listening, providing flexibility for users with limited internet connectivity.

Overall, the ported Realme ColorOS Music app for AOSP ROMs brings the best of Realme's music experience to a wider user base. It combines an appealing user interface, advanced features, and seamless integration with online music services, enhancing the music playback capabilities of AOSP-based devices.
[read more]
item.description:
REALME MUSIC APP
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The Realme ColorOS Music app has been successfully ported for AOSP (Android Open Source Project) ROMs, providing an enhanced music experience for users who prefer custom ROMs on their devices. This ported version brings the feature-rich and visually appealing ColorOS Music app, originally developed for Realme devices, to a wider range of Android smartphones running AOSP-based ROMs.
With the ported Realme ColorOS Music app, users can enjoy a seamless and intuitive music playback experience. The app offers a clean and user-friendly interface, allowing easy navigation and access to various music features. It provides a comprehensive library management system, enabling users to organize and categorize their music collection efficiently.

The app supports various audio formats, ensuring compatibility with a wide range of music files. Users can create custom playlists, shuffle tracks, and enjoy personalized recommendations based on their listening habits. Additionally, it offers a powerful equalizer with preset sound profiles and manual adjustments, allowing users to fine-tune their audio settings according to their preferences.

One notable feature of the ported Realme ColorOS Music app is its integration with online music services. Users can access a vast catalog of songs, stream music online, and discover new artists and albums directly within the app. It also supports downloading music for offline listening, providing flexibility for users with limited internet connectivity.

Overall, the ported Realme ColorOS Music app for AOSP ROMs brings the best of Realme's music experience to a wider user base. It combines an appealing user interface, advanced features, and seamless integration with online music services, enhancing the music playback capabilities of AOSP-based devices.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
REALME MUSIC APP
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The Realme ColorOS Music app has been successfully ported for AOSP (Android Open Source Project) ROMs, providing an enhanced music experience for users who prefer custom ROMs on their devices. This ported version brings the feature-rich and visually appealing ColorOS Music app, originally developed for Realme devices, to a wider range of Android smartphones running AOSP-based ROMs.
With the ported Realme ColorOS Music app, users can enjoy a seamless and intuitive music playback experience. The app offers a clean and user-friendly interface, allowing easy navigation and access to various music features. It provides a comprehensive library management system, enabling users to organize and categorize their music collection efficiently.

The app supports various audio formats, ensuring compatibility with a wide range of music files. Users can create custom playlists, shuffle tracks, and enjoy personalized recommendations based on their listening habits. Additionally, it offers a powerful equalizer with preset sound profiles and manual adjustments, allowing users to fine-tune their audio settings according to their preferences.

One notable feature of the ported Realme ColorOS Music app is its integration with online music services. Users can access a vast catalog of songs, stream music online, and discover new artists and albums directly within the app. It also supports downloading music for offline listening, providing flexibility for users with limited internet connectivity.

Overall, the ported Realme ColorOS Music app for AOSP ROMs brings the best of Realme's music experience to a wider user base. It combines an appealing user interface, advanced features, and seamless integration with online music services, enhancing the music playback capabilities of AOSP-based devices.

AutoMK
(Utilities)
This small application simulates a periodical user input by automatically moving mouse or pressing a key.

item.title: GODSPEED NOROR [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GODSPEED NOROR [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GODSPEED NOROR
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
NOROR (Non-Root Optimization by revWhiteShadow) is a revolutionary Android optimization tool developed by revWhiteShadow, designed specifically for non-rooted devices. NOROR offers a wide range of features and functionalities that enhance the performance and efficiency of Android devices without the need for root access.
One of the key highlights of NOROR is its compatibility with non-rooted Android devices, making it accessible to a larger user base. It provides users with a comprehensive set of 21 custom menus that offer various optimization options tailored to enhance the device's overall performance.

By leveraging these menus, users can optimize their devices in several ways, such as managing background processes, controlling app permissions, fine-tuning system settings, and optimizing battery usage. NOROR empowers users to take control of their device's performance without the complexities and risks associated with rooting.

With NOROR, users can experience improved speed, increased responsiveness, and enhanced battery life on their non-rooted Android devices. It offers a user-friendly interface, making it easy for users to navigate through the menus and customize their device's settings according to their preferences.

Whether you're looking to boost gaming performance, optimize memory usage, or maximize battery efficiency, NOROR provides a comprehensive suite of tools that cater to your specific needs. It serves as an effective alternative to traditional rooting methods by offering a wide range of optimization features accessible to non-rooted Android users.

Revolutionize your Android experience with NOROR and unlock the full potential of your non-rooted device, all while enjoying the benefits of improved performance and optimized system settings.
[read more]
item.description:
GODSPEED NOROR
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
NOROR (Non-Root Optimization by revWhiteShadow) is a revolutionary Android optimization tool developed by revWhiteShadow, designed specifically for non-rooted devices. NOROR offers a wide range of features and functionalities that enhance the performance and efficiency of Android devices without the need for root access.
One of the key highlights of NOROR is its compatibility with non-rooted Android devices, making it accessible to a larger user base. It provides users with a comprehensive set of 21 custom menus that offer various optimization options tailored to enhance the device's overall performance.

By leveraging these menus, users can optimize their devices in several ways, such as managing background processes, controlling app permissions, fine-tuning system settings, and optimizing battery usage. NOROR empowers users to take control of their device's performance without the complexities and risks associated with rooting.

With NOROR, users can experience improved speed, increased responsiveness, and enhanced battery life on their non-rooted Android devices. It offers a user-friendly interface, making it easy for users to navigate through the menus and customize their device's settings according to their preferences.

Whether you're looking to boost gaming performance, optimize memory usage, or maximize battery efficiency, NOROR provides a comprehensive suite of tools that cater to your specific needs. It serves as an effective alternative to traditional rooting methods by offering a wide range of optimization features accessible to non-rooted Android users.

Revolutionize your Android experience with NOROR and unlock the full potential of your non-rooted device, all while enjoying the benefits of improved performance and optimized system settings.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GODSPEED NOROR
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
NOROR (Non-Root Optimization by revWhiteShadow) is a revolutionary Android optimization tool developed by revWhiteShadow, designed specifically for non-rooted devices. NOROR offers a wide range of features and functionalities that enhance the performance and efficiency of Android devices without the need for root access.
One of the key highlights of NOROR is its compatibility with non-rooted Android devices, making it accessible to a larger user base. It provides users with a comprehensive set of 21 custom menus that offer various optimization options tailored to enhance the device's overall performance.

By leveraging these menus, users can optimize their devices in several ways, such as managing background processes, controlling app permissions, fine-tuning system settings, and optimizing battery usage. NOROR empowers users to take control of their device's performance without the complexities and risks associated with rooting.

With NOROR, users can experience improved speed, increased responsiveness, and enhanced battery life on their non-rooted Android devices. It offers a user-friendly interface, making it easy for users to navigate through the menus and customize their device's settings according to their preferences.

Whether you're looking to boost gaming performance, optimize memory usage, or maximize battery efficiency, NOROR provides a comprehensive suite of tools that cater to your specific needs. It serves as an effective alternative to traditional rooting methods by offering a wide range of optimization features accessible to non-rooted Android users.

Revolutionize your Android experience with NOROR and unlock the full potential of your non-rooted device, all while enjoying the benefits of improved performance and optimized system settings.
[read more]

item.title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: faster
item.itunes:summary:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Linux[/b], [b]Windows[/b], [b]macOS[/b], [b]FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert[/b], [b]resize[/b], [b]rotate[/b], and [b]flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF[/b] document into a set of images with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+[/b] formats, set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for [b]free[/b]!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Change the format of an image or group of images simultaneously.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress one or multiple images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a batch of images

You can find more details about [b]Converseen[/b] on the [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net]official website[/url] or on [url=https://github.com/Faster3ck/Converseen]GitHub[/url]. If you enjoy this work, feel free to contribute to its development by making a donation on [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net/donate]PayPal, Ko-Fi, or using Cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE)[/url]!

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows 7/8/10/11[/b][/li]
[li][b]macOS 12 Monterey or later[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.description:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Linux[/b], [b]Windows[/b], [b]macOS[/b], [b]FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert[/b], [b]resize[/b], [b]rotate[/b], and [b]flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF[/b] document into a set of images with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+[/b] formats, set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for [b]free[/b]!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Change the format of an image or group of images simultaneously.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress one or multiple images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a batch of images

You can find more details about [b]Converseen[/b] on the [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net]official website[/url] or on [url=https://github.com/Faster3ck/Converseen]GitHub[/url]. If you enjoy this work, feel free to contribute to its development by making a donation on [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net/donate]PayPal, Ko-Fi, or using Cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE)[/url]!

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows 7/8/10/11[/b][/li]
[li][b]macOS 12 Monterey or later[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Linux[/b], [b]Windows[/b], [b]macOS[/b], [b]FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert[/b], [b]resize[/b], [b]rotate[/b], and [b]flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF[/b] document into a set of images with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+[/b] formats, set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for [b]free[/b]!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Change the format of an image or group of images simultaneously.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress one or multiple images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a batch of images

You can find more details about [b]Converseen[/b] on the [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net]official website[/url] or on [url=https://github.com/Faster3ck/Converseen]GitHub[/url]. If you enjoy this work, feel free to contribute to its development by making a donation on [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net/donate]PayPal, Ko-Fi, or using Cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE)[/url]!

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows 7/8/10/11[/b][/li]
[li][b]macOS 12 Monterey or later[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]

item.title: Okcash [Financial]
item.itunes:title: Okcash [Financial]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Okcash
(Financial)
Your Eco-Friendly, Multi-Chain Digital Currency. Open-source and decentralized, Okcash enables secure, global transactions with no central authority.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]

Okcash
(Financial)
Your Eco-Friendly, Multi-Chain Digital Currency. Open-source and decentralized, Okcash enables secure, global transactions with no central authority.

[read more]

(Financial)
Your Eco-Friendly, Multi-Chain Digital Currency. Open-source and decentralized, Okcash enables secure, global transactions with no central authority.

item.title: Katvan [Text Editors]
item.itunes:title: Katvan [Text Editors]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Katvan
(Text Editors)
A bare-bones editor for Typst files, with a bias for Right-to-Left editing.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
